expected.note: No automatic settlement by design. Escrow stays custodied pending mutual settlement, native appeal, or the deadlock fallback.

verified.release_consensus: ACCEPTED, execution FINISHED_WITH_ERROR, DISAGREE:5 — the "Outcome INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE has no settlement" guard
verified.note: release() correctly reverts; the 0.1 GEN escrow remains fully custodied. This confirms the payout fix did not disturb the non-settling branch: settleable outcomes now pay via EVM external messages, and the unsettleable outcome still refuses to pay at all.
